sections.title: If the player has not visited Great Kourend before

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: The name's Veos. I'm a treasure hunter from the wonderous Kingdom of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great Kourend? Where's that?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Across the sea to the far west. It is a truly magnificent place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. So what brings you to Lumbridge?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'm here on a bit of a hunt. The hunt for treasure. Back in my home of Great Kourend, I came across a scroll. I believe it will lead me to something of great value.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Alas, I've hit a bit of a blocker. The scroll has led me here but as I don't really know the area, I'm not sure what to do next.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hmmm. Maybe you can. You probably know this area better than I do. You might be able to work the scroll out. I'll be able to reward you if you help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good, what should I do?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: First you should go and make some room in your inventory. Once you've done that, you can have a look at this scroll.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Take this scroll. It should lead you to the treasure I seek. Once you've found it, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awesome. Anything else I should know?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: You'll probably want a spade, I find they're pretty much always needed when it comes to hunting treasure. Check the general store if you don't have one. If you need any extra help, just let me know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks Veos.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good thanks.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Fair enough. I'll be here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with it.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hmmm. Well now that you mention it, I could do with some help. The name's Veos. I'm a treasure hunter from the wonderous Kingdom of Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great Kourend? Where's that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

sections.title: If the player has visited Great Kourend before

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos. What brings you to Lumbridge?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'm here on a bit of a treasure hunt. Back in Kourend I came across a scroll. I believe it will lead me to something of great value.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Alas, I've hit a bit of a blocker. The scroll has led me here but as I don't really know the area, I'm not sure what to do next.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hmmm. Maybe you can. You probably know this area better than I do. You might be able to work the scroll out. I'll be able to reward you if you help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good, what should I do?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: First you should go and make some room in your inventory. Once you've done that, you can have a look at this scroll.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Take this scroll. It should lead you to the treasure I seek. Once you've found it, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awesome. Anything else I should know?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: You'll probably want a spade, I find they're pretty much always needed when it comes to hunting treasure. Check the general store if you don't have one.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I'll be sticking around here a little longer before heading back to my ship. If you need extra guidance with anything, just let me know and I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks Veos.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well good luck with it.

sections.title: Talking to Veos again if the player previously did not have inventory space for the treasure scroll

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Ready to help with this treasure hunt?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: First you should go and make some room in your inventory. Once you've done that, you can have a look at this scroll.

sections.title: Talking to Veos after losing an item

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: I came across this [scroll/orb]. Did you lose it by any chance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did, thanks Veos.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Not to worry. Just try to be careful with it.

sections.title: Talking to Veos after receiving the first clue

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about my quest.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How's the treasure hunt going?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: This is the scroll I gave you. I don't know how to solve it I'm afraid. Maybe look for someone named Bob?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, bring it to me.

sections.title: Talking to Veos after receiving the second clue

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about my quest.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How's the treasure hunt going?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Looks like a map to me. I'd assume the X marks where you need to go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

sections.title: Talking to Veos after receiving the third clue

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about my quest.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How's the treasure hunt going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could do with some extra help.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Interesting, these are quite rare. They work using temperature. The closer you are, the hotter the orb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, bring it to me.

sections.title: Talking to Veos after receiving the fourth clue

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about my quest.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How's the treasure hunt going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could do with some extra help.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Ah a cipher, I've seen these before. Try shifting the letters to the left or right. That normally works.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, meet me at my ship. It's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Well keep at it. Once you've found the treasure, bring it to me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmmm... Must have been the wind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anyway, this must be the treasure that Veos is after. I should take it to him. If I remember right, he's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

sections.title: Attempting to open the ancient casket

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think Veos would want me to open his treasure. I should take it to him. If I remember right, it's docked at the northernmost pier in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Veos.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: How's the treasure hunt going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found the treasure!

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Excellent. I'll take it off your hands now.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Brilliant. This is just what I was looking for. Thank you so much for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem. So what is this treasure anyway?

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Oh err... nothing important. Just something that might be of use to me back in Great Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you say so...

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Anyway, as promised, a reward for you.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: Anyway, I'd best be getting back to Great Kourend. I'm sure I'll be back here before long though, there's always more treasure to be found.

lines.speaker: Veos
lines.text: If you ever fancy visiting the kingdom, come find me here. I'm more than happy to take you there. Consider it an extra thank you for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds great, thanks Veos.
